prompt_inputs.goal: Weight loss to improve endurance during long-distance running

solution_criteria: Total daily calories do not exceed 2500
At least 1.6 grams of protein per kilogram of body weight from plant-based sources
Carbohydrate intake is balanced with complex carbohydrates and fiber-rich foods
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete Do not use any special characters that can break the json structure of the generated output.
scenario: Testing with incomplete information (e.g., ' athlete' without any specific sport or diet needs)

solution_criteria: Total daily calories: 1500-1800
Macro-nutrient balance (carbs: 55%, protein: 25%, fat: 20%)
At least 3 servings of fruits and vegetables per day
No added sugars or saturated fats

solution_criteria: Total daily calories: 2500
Macronutrient balance: 1.6g protein, 2g fat, 60g carbohydrates per day
Meal frequency: 5 meals, including 3 main meals and 2 snacks
Hydration: at least 8 cups of water per day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete Do not use any special characters that can break the json structure of the generated output.
scenario: Testing with contradictory requirements (e.g., 'healthy' and ' athlete')

Macro-nutrient distribution meets muscle gain goals (1.6g protein, 2g carbs, 0.5g fat per kilogram of body weight)
All meals are planned within a 30-minute window after waking up

Macro-nutrient balance (protein:35%, fat:20%, carbs:45%)
